title: Pattern matching using LIKE not working with UFT8MB4_BIN collation
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE UTF8MB4_test_extended (id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, text_col1 VARCHAR(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_bin, text_col2 VARCHAR(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_bin, text_col3 TEXT CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_bin);
INSERT INTO UTF8MB4_test_extended (text_col1, text_col2, text_col3) VALUES ('Sample text', 'Sample text', 'Sample text with more characters');
INSERT INTO UTF8MB4_test_extended (text_col1, text_col2, text_col3) VALUES ('𠝹𠱓𠱸𠲖𠳏𠳕𠴕𠵼𠵿𠸎𠸏𠹷', '𠝹𠱓𠱸𠲖𠳏𠳕𠴕𠵼𠵿𠸎𠸏𠹷', 'Another text with 𠝹𠱓𠱸');
SELECT * FROM UTF8MB4_test_extended WHERE text_col1 LIKE '𠝹%';
key_bug_features: LIKE operator fails with indexed UTF8MB4_BIN column
